description: Create the complete modern portfolio website as a single-page static HTML/CSS/JS application styled after nikolovlazar.com. This includes: index.html with all sections and content, css/style.css with all styling (dark/light theme, animations, responsive design), and js/main.js with theme toggle, smooth scroll, and scroll animations. ALL data from the original config.yaml must be present.
steps: Create css/style.css with: (a) CSS custom properties for dark/light themes (dark default), (b) system font stack for body (Inter-like: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', etc), monospace font for accents, (c) reset/normalize styles, (d) dark theme: near-black background (#0a0a0a or #111), light gray text, subtle borders, (e) light theme: white/off-white background, dark text, (f) smooth theme transitions (background-color, color transitions), (g) sticky minimal navbar styles, (h) hero section with large typography and generous whitespace, (i) card-based layouts with hover effects (subtle scale/shadow on hover), (j) timeline styles for experience section with connecting lines, (k) skill tags/badges, (l) responsive grid for projects, (m) fade-in animation keyframes and utility classes, (n) responsive breakpoints (mobile-first), (o) smooth scrolling on html element, (p) section padding with generous whitespace, (q) footer styles with social icons

Create js/main.js with: (a) theme toggle functionality (stores preference in localStorage, toggles data-theme attribute on document), (b) smooth scroll for navigation links, (c) IntersectionObserver-based scroll animations (fade-in elements when they enter viewport), (d) mobile menu toggle (hamburger), (e) navbar background change on scroll (transparent at top, solid when scrolled)

Create index.html with complete semantic HTML structure including: (a) DOCTYPE, head with meta tags (viewport, description, Open Graph), title 'Keerthi Sreenivas', link to css/style.css, (b) nav bar with name/logo on left, section links (About, Experience, Education, Projects, Achievements, Contact) on right, theme toggle button (sun/moon icons as inline SVG), hamburger menu for mobile, (c) Hero section: greeting 'Hi there! I\'m', large name 'Keerthi Sreenivas', role 'Enterprise Support Engineer at AWS', CTA button linking to topmate.io, social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Instagram) as inline SVG icons, hero image (images/me_.jpg), (d) About section: heading, image (images/tempImageuVymn1_adobe_express.jpeg), full bio text, skills displayed as tags/badges, (e) Experience section with timeline layout containing ALL 6 positions with company, date, location, and all bullet points, (f) Education section with both entries including all details (GPA, activities, coursework), (g) Achievements section with all 5 achievement items as cards, (h) Projects section with 3 project cards each having: image, title, description, links (GitHub, presentation/details), (i) Contact section with message text and email button linking to mailto:keerthikonjety9@gmail.com, (j) Footer with social links and copyright, (k) script tag linking to js/main.js
Ensure all image references use relative paths: images/me_.jpg, images/tempImageuVymn1_adobe_express.jpeg, images/projects/Colorization3.png, images/projects/doge4.jpeg, images/projects/advert1.jpeg
Ensure all external links (GitHub repos, LinkedIn, Instagram, topmate.io, company URLs, project links) open in new tabs with target=_blank and rel=noopener noreferrer

Verify the HTML includes ALL experience entries (AWS, Barclays, Allogene, Simon Business School, KITOLIT, BITS Pilani Indibots), ALL education entries, ALL achievements, ALL projects with their links, and ALL social links from the original config.yaml
acceptance_criteria: index.html exists at repo root with valid HTML5 structure
css/style.css contains dark/light theme variables, responsive styles, animations, and all component styles
js/main.js contains theme toggle, smooth scroll, scroll animations, and mobile menu functionality
All 6 experience entries are present with full details
Both education entries are present with GPA, activities, and coursework
All 3 projects are displayed with images and links
Hero section contains name, role, social links, CTA button, and image
About section contains full bio text and skills
Contact section contains message and email link
Dark mode is the default theme
Site is responsive (mobile nav, flexible grids)
All images are referenced with correct relative paths from repo root
verification: Run: test -f index.html && test -f css/style.css && test -f js/main.js && echo 'All files exist'
Run: grep -c 'Amazon Web Services' index.html (should find AWS entry)
Run: grep -c 'Barclays' index.html (should find Barclays entry)
Run: grep -c 'Allogene' index.html (should find Allogene entry)
Run: grep -c 'Simon Business School' index.html (should find teaching entry)
Run: grep -c 'KITOLIT' index.html (should find KITOLIT entry)
Run: grep -c 'BITS Pilani' index.html (should find IoT intern entry)
Run: grep -c 'Marketing Insights' index.html (should find project)
Run: grep 'data-theme' index.html (should find theme attribute usage)
Run: grep 'images/me_.jpg' index.html (should find hero image reference)
Run: grep 'images/projects/' index.html (should find project image references)
findings: All three files created successfully (index.html, css/style.css, js/main.js). The .gitkeep files were removed from css/ and js/ directories. Had to fix Python string escaping issues with dollar signs ($80,000 and $6,400) that resulted in null bytes or missing characters in the HTML output. All 6 experience entries, both education entries, 4 achievements, 3 projects with correct image paths, and all social/external links are present with target=_blank rel=noopener noreferrer.
